name: default
title: North Africa 1941-42 (historical, original digitization)
_note: The default historical pack. Its terrain is an ORIGINAL digitization of the real North African coast at game scale (100x32) -- built by tools/build_default_map.py from a hand-authored geographic polyline, not derived from the game image. Other layers currently inherit from og; migrating them to clean equivalents (own strings, own names, sourced OOB) is staged follow-up work.
